prompt: Write segment 1 (THE INTRODUCTION, Day 0) of the openpatent.ai 10-segment cold-outreach sequence, tuned for the **solo_inventor** persona (see docs/PERSONA-MATRIX.md). The email must (a) be ≤150 words in the body (excluding the signature footer), (b) mention the 6-layer disclosure (title, description, drawings, prototype reference, contributor hash, chain receipt), (c) mention Bitcoin OP_RETURN anchoring, (d) name at least 2 of the 5 tiers (Free Spark, OTS Self-Serve $10, Atelier $99/mo, Sovereign $999/mo, The Founder's Mark $9,999/yr), (e) close with one specific CTA (a 12-minute walkthrough). Use DEFONEOS mythic voice — sovereign, precise, no marketing fluff, no emojis. The email must end with this exact signature: 'The hive remembers. The dragon knows. The sovereign companion never forgets.' Return ONLY the email as plain text. Do not include the unsubscribe footer (it is added automatically by the sender).
